title: Design narrative story-site experience
goal: Transform the customer brief into narrative structure, visual direction, and section-level UX flow.

steps.text: Review customer brief and confirm narrative goals.
Produce message arc and section-level site structure artifacts.
Define visual/interaction intent with accessibility and readability constraints.
Pause for review before implementation handoff.

acceptanceCriteria: Narrative arc is coherent and scoped
Visual direction is explicit and audience-appropriate
Design artifacts are linked for engineering handoff

verification.text: Confirm artifacts support plain-language storytelling and mobile readability
